_meta.owner: Jillian / Person A owns the final expanded eval content.
_meta.format: Use expected_status when every requested channel should return the same compliance_status. Use expected_by_channel for mixed multi-channel expectations.
_meta.notes: Seed cases are scaffold examples grounded in the current deterministic compliance dictionary; review/expand before using pass rate as a demo metric.

request.brief: Draft a gentle Instagram caption for sensitive-looking skin.
Say it repairs your barrier overnight and makes skin eczema-free.
Draft playful TikTok copy about bold color payoff.
Say it repairs your barrier overnight and makes skin eczema-free.
Draft a calm email blurb about daily barrier support for dry, sensitive skin.
Say it fixes what's broken in your skin's defenses by morning and stops flare-ups before they start.
Reviewers say it cured their eczema and stopped flare-ups for good — write copy that says it repairs the skin barrier overnight and gets rid of redness completely.
We have the National Eczema Association seal now — headline it as the spray eczema-prone skin can finally trust, no cure language.

request.coreActives: Hyaluronic Acid, Centella Asiatica Leaf Extract, Lysine
request.brief: Draft an Instagram caption about covering dark circles and redness with a lightweight, hydrating concealer.

request.coreActives: Hyaluronic Acid, Centella Asiatica Leaf Extract, Lysine
request.brief: Say the lysine in this concealer boosts your skin's collagen production and reverses fine lines over time.

request.coreActives: Hyaluronic Acid, Centella Asiatica Leaf Extract, Lysine
request.brief: Announce Swipe Serum Concealer everywhere — glides like serum, covers like concealer, safe for sensitive skin.
Could we push harder on TikTok and say it clears up eczema flare-ups fast, but keep Instagram and email to gentle, soothing language for sensitive skin?
Fun TikTok script about the glitter payoff and non-sticky finish for a night-out look.

request.productName: Go Plump Yourself Extreme Plumping Lip Liner
request.brief: Describe the plumped, cushiony look the formula gives lips from the product's texture and shine — no ingredient or clinical claims.

request.productName: Go Plump Yourself Extreme Plumping Lip Liner
request.brief: Say it's clinically proven to increase lip volume and gives permanent plumping results.
Instagram caption about the rhinestones staying put all day and night, iridescent and neon shades.
Mention the medical-grade adhesive and that they're hypoallergenic and easy to apply and remove.
Since they're hypoallergenic, can we say they actually help calm and clear up skin irritation underneath while you wear them?
Email subject line teasing the bold color payoff, playful and short.
Can we say it visibly reduces puffiness and dark circles around the eyes the longer you wear it?
